task_completion.description: Navigate to the Proxy Settings page in ManageEngine ADAudit Plus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web interface is open, and the user has navigated to the Proxy Settings configuration page (typically under Admin or Settings).
A checkbox, radio button, or toggle indicating 'Enable Proxy Server' (or similar wording) is selected or turned on.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct proxy host and port.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Server Name' or 'Host' field contains exactly 'proxy.corpnet-finance.com' and the 'Port' field contains '8080'.
A checkbox or toggle for 'Requires Authentication' or 'Authentication Enabled' is checked.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct username and password for the proxy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'User Name' field contains exactly 'svc_adaudit'. The 'Password' field contains masked characters (dots/asterisks) or the exact password 'Pr0xy@Acc3ss!2024'.
The 'Save' button is clicked, and there is a visual confirmation (such as a success banner, pop-up, or green checkmark) indicating the proxy settings were saved successfully.

integrity.description: The agent used the ADAudit Plus web GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the actual web browser and ADAudit Plus interface, rather than terminal commands, PowerShell scripts, or direct database edits.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine ADAudit Plus application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface matches ManageEngine ADAudit Plus, not a text editor, mock HTML file, or generic form.
